# ExportAI
> Export AI conversations from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok & Perplexity as PDF, Markdown, TXT, JSON, or CSV.

## What is ExportAI?
ExportAI is a Chrome/Edge extension that lets you export conversations from 6 AI platforms in 5 formats. One extension replaces 3+ competitors. 100% client-side, no backend, no data collection.

## Supported Platforms
- ChatGPT (chatgpt.com)
- Claude (claude.ai)
- Gemini (gemini.google.com)
- DeepSeek (chat.deepseek.com)
- Grok (grok.com, x.com/i/grok)
- Perplexity (perplexity.ai)

## Export Formats
- PDF (formatted document with code highlighting)
- Markdown (for Notion, Obsidian, GitHub)
- Plain Text
- JSON (structured data)
- CSV (spreadsheet-ready)

## Pricing
- Free: Unlimited MD/TXT/JSON/CSV, 3 PDF/day
- Pro: $4.99/month — unlimited everything
- Lifetime: $49 one-time

## Privacy
All processing happens client-side in the browser. No servers, no databases, no data collection.
